sub_tasks.name: Diagnose AND-CELLULAR-001
sub_tasks.scope: Identify why Android cellular message sending fails
objectives: Analyze logs and code to find the root cause
constraints: Must not affect identity and message history

sub_tasks.name: Diagnose CROSS-RELAY-001
sub_tasks.scope: Identify why cross-platform relay circuit delivery fails
objectives: Analyze logs and code to find the root cause
constraints: Must not affect identity and message history

sub_tasks.name: Implement Fix for AND-CELLULAR-001
sub_tasks.scope: Apply the necessary fixes to enable Android cellular message sending
objectives: Add QUIC/UDP endpoints for GCP relay and OSX relay
constraints: Must follow coding standards and best practices

sub_tasks.name: Implement Fix for CROSS-RELAY-001
sub_tasks.scope: Apply the necessary fixes to enable cross-platform relay circuit delivery
objectives: Add QUIC/UDP endpoints for GCP relay
constraints: Must follow coding standards and best practices

sub_tasks.name: Test Fix for AND-CELLULAR-001
sub_tasks.scope: Verify that the fixes work as expected for Android cellular message sending
objectives: Run tests to ensure Android cellular message sending works
expected_outcomes: Tests passing and Android cellular message sending functional
constraints: Must achieve at least 90% test coverage

sub_tasks.name: Test Fix for CROSS-RELAY-001
sub_tasks.scope: Verify that the fixes work as expected for cross-platform relay circuit delivery
objectives: Run tests to ensure cross-platform relay circuit delivery works
expected_outcomes: Tests passing and cross-platform relay circuit delivery functional
constraints: Must achieve at least 90% test coverage

sub_tasks.name: Document Fixes
sub_tasks.scope: Update documentation to reflect the fixes
objectives: Ensure documentation is accurate and up-to-date
